services.usageSource: gh repo view Aneety/ai --json visibility,isPrivate; gh run list --repo Aneety/ai --limit 1000 --json createdAt,updatedAt

freeAllowance.label: standard GitHub-hosted runners in public repositories

services.calculation: Aneety/ai visibility is PUBLIC. 231.92 observed minutes from 2026-06-01T00:00:00Z to 2026-06-02T20:59:29Z divided by elapsed month ratio 0.06248804012345679 = 3711.38 projected minutes. GitHub standard runners are free for public repositories, so projected cost is 0.
4 Wrangler Worker configs are present in the repo, below the Workers Free allowance of 100 Workers per account.

services.usageSource: publication-evidence.json files for gateway-borda, tenant-white-label, identidade-acesso and onboarding-acesso plus smoke contract /health and /contract
services.calculation: 8 smoke requests observed in versioned publication evidence divided by elapsed month ratio 0.06248804012345679 = 128.02 projected requests, below 100,000/day * 30 days = 3,000,000 requests/month. Cloudflare Free plan returns an error after the daily limit instead of converting this proof into paid usage.

services.usageSource: Static SQL inventory: find aneety-platform/apps -path '*/db-*/*.sql' -type f; 19 SELECT statements across the three current D1 banco modules; no d1-validation-evidence.json is versioned yet.
services.calculation: Conservative projection for one daily full D1 gate pass across the three current banco modules: 19 SELECT statements over tiny seed/fixture data rounded up to 100 rows read/day, below the Workers Free D1 allowance of 5,000,000 rows read/day. Free-plan overage returns D1 API errors rather than converting this proof into paid usage.

services.usageSource: Static SQL inventory: find aneety-platform/apps -path '*/db-*/*.sql' -type f; 35 INSERT, 11 UPDATE, 43 CREATE and 43 DROP statements across the three current D1 banco modules; no d1-validation-evidence.json is versioned yet.
services.calculation: Conservative projection for one daily full D1 gate pass across the three current banco modules: 35 INSERT + 11 UPDATE + 43 CREATE + 43 DROP statements = 132 potential written/DDL operations/day, below the Workers Free D1 allowance of 100,000 rows written/day. DDL may contribute to mixed rows read/written, so it is included conservatively.

services.usageSource: D1 gate design creates one ephemeral database per validation and deletes it in cleanup; current SQL fixtures are tiny demo records for three banco modules and no d1-validation-evidence.json is versioned yet.
services.calculation: Conservative storage projection for the remote D1 validation gate is 0.001 GB/account for ephemeral validation databases and tiny seed/fixture rows, below the Workers Free D1 total storage allowance of 5 GB. Empty D1 databases are documented as approximately 12 KB and cleanup deletes gate-created databases.
